title: PaymentSettlementSummary
description: A structure representing information about a settlement

capture_submit_time.description: The date and time GOV.UK Pay asked your payment service provider to take the payment from your user’s account. This value uses Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) and ISO 8601 format - `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.SSSZ`

captured_date.description: The date your payment service provider took the payment from your user. This value uses ISO 8601 format - `YYYY-MM-DD`

settled_date.description: The date that the transaction was paid into the service's account.
